loop1.title: Context Rail Header (Overview / Section / Feeder)
loop1.note: Showing total feeder consumption and quick stats for active members (UPS, BPDB). Solar Incomers are listed in breakdown but have no live data (has_data=N).

loop1.title: Real Time Monitoring (Feeder Heatmap)
loop1.note: Showing live power distribution across all LT-PCC feeders. Load % (loadPct) is honest-blanked because the asset's rated_kva is unknown (nameplate is '—'), so a percentage cannot be calculated. Dark feeders (UPS-05, UPS-06) have no live data and render as blank rows.

loop1.title: Consumption Trend / Supply Trend
loop1.note: Showing panel aggregate consumption trend from 6 active outgoing feeders (UPS-01/02/03, BPDB-01/02, UPS-04); 2 feeders (UPS-05/06) are dark and honest-blanked.

loop1.title: Quick Stats
loop1.note: Showing total current and unbalance from member UPS feeders; transformer incomers are offline.
